{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Suncaster L-14
| introduced = lh-02-the-engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Suncaster L-14]] is a heavy plasma launcher version of the Lightcaster.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c48">''The Engineer'', chapter 48</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon artifacts]]
